programme.title: Capítulo 196
programme.desc: Diego is distraught over Roberta and Simon. Mía pretends to be drunk and kisses Miguel. Valeria had a nervous breakdown. Valeria makes Peter quit. Diego admits he's in love with Roberta. Miguel finds out that Mía wasn't really drunk and confronts her. Gastón reacts angrily when Mía ends their relationship. Simon tells the band they sold out on their concert at the Palacio. León wants the Palacio as his campaign spot. Camilo asks Celina out on a date. Gastón taunts Miguel. Alma confronts Valeria over the letter.

programme.title: Capítulo 197
programme.desc: Valeria denies writing the letter. Celina leaves school without permission; Renata tells her parents. Gastón harasses Miguel and threatens him with the information he gathered in Monterrey. Miguel demands Mía tell Gastón that she not dating him. Giovanni and Vico find out that Madariaga might be leaving. Diego begs Roberta for forgiveness and another chance or he won't do the concert; she agrees. Celina's father shows up at school and gives her an ultimatum. Hilda becomes jealous. Pepa thinks Peter is trying to take her job. Gastón calls Franco to meet. Mía tells Gastón the truth about Miguel. Peter tells Mía he sent the letter.

programme.title: Capítulo 198
programme.desc: Roberta asks Madariaga if he's leaving; he says no. Lupita tries to help Celina with her family troubles. León tells Diego he's searching for the RBD members. Peter tells Mía the letter was written by her mom fifteen years ago. Mía decides to move in with Alma. Galia tells Pilar she will go to therapy; and also that Madariaga is leaving after the year. Celina introduces Camilo and her father. The students help give a makeover to Hilario. Roberta decides to move in with Franco.

programme.title: Capítulo 199
programme.desc: No one believes Pilar when she tells them Madariaga is leaving. Alicia goes on a fake date with Hilario. Marcelino convinces Peter that he's fired. Mía tells her dad she ended it with Gastón. León approaches Alma about RBD. Franco gives Miguel a check for his tuition next year. Gastón reveals Miguel's revenge to Mía. Mía asks Miguel about his dad's death. Diego confronts Roberta about their love.

programme.title: Capítulo 200
programme.desc: Diego tells Roberta he's ready to confront his dad about her and the band. Gastón hears Celina throwing up. Tomás feels like his life is no longer enjoyable. Roberta decides to stay with Simon and not forgive Diego. Franco and Alma fight over Peter. Lupita tells Mía that she won't be going to Orlando. José and the others decide to hire an escort for Alicia.

programme.title: Capítulo 201
programme.desc: It's revealed that Celina has bulimia. Roberta beats up Pilar for saying Madariaga is leaving. Madariaga tells the kids he's leaving. The girls find an escort. Diego, Giovanni, and Tomás get Simon's number and find out he's married. Nico convinces Miguel to show Gastón he is on good terms with Franco. Pilar tells everyone Madariaga was pushed out. The kids go on strike for Madariaga. Alma tries to gather information on Simon. Gandia expels the scholarship students. Renata interrupts Madariaga's meeting to bring him back to the school.

programme.title: Capítulo 202
programme.desc: Mayra scolds the students who walked out of the protest. Madariaga offers his resignation in exchange for the kids not to be expelled. Diego mentions Simon's wife in front of him and Roberta. Madariaga's project is denied. León learns that the members of RBD go to Elite Way School. Giovanni and Tomás find Simon's address. After León's visit, Gandia awkwardly interrogates Diego. Diego gets Roberta to meeting Simon's wife.

programme.title: Capítulo 203
programme.desc: Franco tells Mía that Miguel refuses to accept the house or stay in Mexico. Hilda sees Alicia with Popeye. Alma and Franco once again fight over Peter. Yuli tells Nico she's not going on the family vacation. Mía asks Gastón to tell her what he knows, later he gives her an envelope with evidence against Miguel. Pilar tells Roberta that Diego will give up RBD names. Alma and Diego decide to work together to expose Simon; she sees Simon with his baby. Madariaga rather have the kids angry at him than tell the truth. The kids literally turn their back on Madariaga. Gandia thinks Hilda ordered the escort. Mía reflects on her precious moments with Miguel.

programme.title: Capítulo 204
programme.desc: Gandia calls out the RBD members for expulsion. Mía tells Franco Miguel's dad died because of him and Miguel came here for revenge. Diego's plans to help the band are revealed. Franco tells Mía that Carlo was responsible for Miguel's dad financial ruin and subsequent death. Simon tells Roberta he has a son. Franco grants Gastón permission to protect Mía from Miguel. Gastón threatens Miguel. Celina has a bulimic scare. Carlo returns to Mexico. Mía confronts Miguel about his revenge; the most explosive scene of their relationship.

programme.title: Se busca un padre

Luche reúnen al Lechero, al Carnicero, al Repartidor de propaganda de puerta en puerta, Don Camerino, el Licenciado cortillo y Flavio. Al no tener los resultados que esperaban, los dejan como inocentes, al pasar 8 semanas, llega el momento del nacimiento, pero termina el capítulo dejando en misterio hasta la próxima Temporada.

programme.title: Hasta en las más mejores familias

programme.title: Viva el Domingo
programme.desc: Federica hace planes para comer con sus papás pero Ludovico muere por ver el fútbol, así que arma una estrategia para regresar temprano a casa. En casa de sus suegros, Ludovico se las ingenia para estar enterado de cómo va el partido.

programme.desc: Luis le pide a Silvita que deje de hablar con su ex, pues se siente incómodo, sin sospechar que Maru, ex de Luis, llegará a la puerta de su casa. Además, la obra de arte de Jorjais.

programme.title: El cumpleaños de Germán
programme.desc: Todos se olvidan del cumpleaños de Germán, a pesar de estar invitados a la fiesta. Lorena y Frankie le dicen a Benito que volverá a los castings.

programme.title: La amiga incómoda
programme.desc: La amiga de Silvita se queda en el departamento de los recién casados, ya que se ha quedado sin casa. Además, Magda trata de convencer a los vecinos para que acepten poner un anuncio en la fachada del edificio.

programme.title: El nuevo reglamento
programme.desc: Los Rivers solo tienen dinero para comer atún. Así que Frankie envía a Benito a hacer el casting para interpretar al Sol. Pero Luis propone realizar un nuevo reglamento de convivencia vecinal.

programme.title: La historia de Jorjáis
programme.desc: Jorjáis cuenta su verdadera historia, y hará llorar a más de uno. Mientras tanto, como Frankie y Lorena no están en casa, Benito y Liz aprovecharán para hacer algo en su ausencia.

programme.title: La cocina económica
programme.desc: Jorjáis deja su sillón en la entrada del edificio de los vecinos, pero en un momento de descuido, desaparece. Lorena abre una cocina económica.

programme.title: Una pareja real
programme.desc: Los Rivers abren la correspondencia de los López Pérez y se enteran de que les embargarán la lavadora. ¿Magdalena se atreverá a demandarlos?

programme.title: La bocinota
programme.desc: Una refaccionaria se instala en la accesoria del edificio. La inauguración causa molestia entre los vecinos. Rocko y Arturo aprovechan para conseguir chamba en el local.

programme.title: Bienvenido doctor
programme.desc: El doctor Rafael Rivas se muda al edificio y Magdalena no deja pasar la oportunidad para conseguir una consulta gratis abusando de la confianza del nuevo inquilino.

programme.title: Una de terror
programme.desc: Silvita trata de mantener limpios los pasillos del edificio, ya que Lorena y Magdalena sacaron todas sus macetas. Mientras Luis trabaja, Pedro y Cris verán una película.

programme.title: Matrimonio perfecto
programme.desc: Silvita le demostrará a su vieja amiga Caro que tiene un matrimonio perfecto con Luis. Además, Lorena culpa a Germán por no tener limpio el patio del edificio.

programme.title: Roof Garden
programme.desc: Frankie abre un canal de videos para hablar sobre todo lo que sabe de cine. Mientras tanto, Magdalena quiere tener un departamento con un jardín en el techo.

programme.title: Megacorte de agua
programme.desc: La alcaldía anuncia un mega corte de agua y los vecinos acabarán con el suministro del edificio. Los López Pérez instalan un aire acondicionado en su departamento.

programme.title: Bloopers
programme.desc: Un capítulo especial con las equivocaciones de los vecinos más divertidas de la temporada. Descubre quién de los inquilinos comete más errores a la hora de grabar los episodios de la serie.

programme.title: Las palomas
programme.desc: A plague of pigeons arrives at the building and the neighbors fight them off with help from Germán. The López Pérez family runs out of coffee and Arturo must get it from the neighbors.

programme.title: Quédate en casa
programme.desc: The neighbors organize to fight the Coronavirus pandemic. The situation is complicated when someone steals the antibacterial gel from the entrance.

programme.title: El huerto de Vanesa
programme.desc: Vanesa puts a garden in the building, but discovers that someone is stealing her vegetables. Rocko has an intense toothache and doesn't want to go to the dentist.

programme.title: Sortilegio
programme.desc: Alejandro returns home after a terrible accident to discover that he is married to Maria Jose, a poor, innocent girl who was deceived by Alejandro's brother Bruno. Bruno used Alejandro's name to marry Maria Jose, soon after he sent to kill his brother in hopes that Maria Jose would inherit Alejandro's fortune. But when Maria Jose arrives at the mansion she realizes that Bruno lied to her and used her. She is also scared when Alejandro is found alive and returns home. Doctors tell Alejandro that he suffers from memory loss but he is convinced he never met Maria Jose before and goes in search of the truth, but during this time and Maria Jose actually fall in love, while Bruno and Maura (Alejandro's ex-girlfriend) plot to break them up. Meanwhile, the brothers' mother Victoria has fallen in love with Fernando--Alejandro's best friend, so closer to his age than hers.

programme.title: Missing Pistol Pursuit
programme.desc: Stop sticks are used to intercept a vehicle with more bullets than the local shooting range. Two suspects watch their life unravel after being found dope sick with meth, heroin, and shattered dreams.

programme.title: Puppy Luck
programme.desc: Cameras catch police in action as they confront crime and comfort victims.

programme.title: Hauling a Heater
programme.desc: Lies can't hide the truth when a stolen U-Haul is seized during a felony traffic stop. A suspect with his pants down has no hiding places for his alleged meth pipe.

programme.title: 2 Flats Don't Make a Right
programme.desc: A suspect forgets to drive away after breaking into a used car lot. A dispute over money ends in felony vandalism. The truth can be fleeting when suspects are found with narcotics and tall tales.

programme.title: Palms Are Sweaty
programme.desc: A man receives an enormous break due to public health concerns. Officers are doubtful when two friends claim they were unaware of each other's actions. Police pull over a car full of people who know very little about themselves.

programme.title: Gate Crusher Pursuit
programme.desc: A high-stakes car chase involves tire spikes, shredded rubber, and crashed gates in Las Vegas. Suspects accused of burglary state they only steal to pay rent. A routine traffic stop proves there's always more than meets the eye.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: A suspect tries to outrun the law by bicycle but can't out pedal police horsepower. A deputy goes undercover to investigate stolen baseballs. A K-9 unit discovers hidden contraband on a suspect's most private places.

programme.desc: When the LAPD's elite Special Investigations Squad (SIS) is assigned a high-profile quadruple homicide, veteran detective Eldon Perry (Kurt Russell) takes the case. Known for his tough street tactics and a fiery temper, Eldon also tutors rookie Bobby Keough (Scott Speedman) in the grim realities of police intimidation and corruption. programme.title: My Son, The Chimp
programme.desc: An organ grinder's fugitive monkey leads Fester to believe that he has turned Pugsley into a monkey. Morticia and Gomez treat the monkey as though he were their son, welcoming him to the dinner table and giving him Pugsley's chores.

programme.title: Morticia's Favorite Charity
programme.desc: Moriticia's favorite charity is having an auction--so Morticia persuades her family to part with things to sell. Donations include Wednesday's headless doll, the old flogging table, a stuffed vulture and Uncle Fester's dynamite.

programme.title: Progress And The Addams Family
programme.desc: The Addams Family ignores notices that their house is to be condemned to make way for a freeway. When sudden explosions cannot be traced to any member of the family but, instead, to city workmen, Gomez is forced to consider moving the house.

programme.title: Uncle Fester's Toupee
programme.desc: Uncle Fester's pen pal, Madelyn, is coming to visit. Fester panics, as he has described himself as handsome, heroic and romantic. Gomez and Morticia agree that all Fester needs is a toupee and they help him make several styles.

programme.title: Cousin Itt And The Vocational Counselor
programme.desc: Morticia and Gomez are worried about Cousin Itt because he spends his days sleeping and dreaming in his tiny room. They decide that Itt would make an excellent marriage counselor, and pretend to be a couple with a failing marriage.

programme.title: Lurch, The Teenage Idol
programme.desc: A recording company's platter of Lurch's gravelly voice brings a screaming mob of teenage fans to the Addams house. To calm the crowd, Lurch seats himself at the harpsichord and rewards his fans with a song to end all songs.

programme.title: The Winning Of Morticia Addams
programme.desc: Taken in by a psychologist's pronouncement that the only happily married couples are those who fight, members of the Addams household devise schemes to start a battle between Gomez (John Astin) and Morticia (Carolyn Jones).

programme.title: My Fair Cousin Itt
programme.desc: Gomez decides to bolster Cousin Itt's failing ego by making him the star of a production aimed as a birthday surprise for Wednesday. He hires the great director, Eric von Bissell, who gives Itt elocution lessons, causing a Hollywood star complex.

programme.title: Morticia's Romance (Part 1)
programme.desc: While Morticia and Gomez are celebrating their 13th wedding anniversary, she tells Wednesday and Pugsley a bedtime story of how she and Gomez first met. In this episode, Carolyn Jones plays Morticia, Morticia as a 22-year-old, and sister Ophelia.

programme.title: Morticia's Romance (Part 2)
programme.desc: Wednesday and Pugsley refuse to go to bed until they hear the rest of the courtship story. Morticia resumes the tale via flashback, including the ceremony beginning with Ophelia Frump, Morticia's balmy sister, as the bride.

programme.title: Morticia Meets Royalty
programme.desc: Romance seems close for Thing, the Addams right-hand-in-a-box, when Gomez's aunt arrives for a visit accompanied by Lady Fingers, her handmaiden. Thing enjoys the visit most because it gives him a chance to hold hands with one of his own kind.

programme.title: Gomez, The People's Choice
programme.desc: Morticia and Gomez visit Mayor Henson to complain that their property tax is ridiculously low. After the Mayor proves his incompetence by offering a refund, Gomez is persuaded to become a candidate for the office.

programme.title: Cousin Itt's Problem
programme.desc: During a welcome home party for Cousin Itt, Morticia notices that the diminutive guest of honor seems to be losing his hair. Uncle Fester experiments with his chemistry set to produce a concoction that grows hair and tries the remedy on Itt.

programme.title: Halloween, Addams Style
programme.desc: Wednesday and Pugsley return in tears from trick-or-treating because a neighbor has told them there is no such thing as a witch. Morticia and Gomez plan to prove to the children that they do exist--by summoning a witch to a séance.

programme.title: Morticia, The Writer
programme.desc: Determined to correct the dreadful literature that Wednesday and Pugsley are exposed to, Morticia sets out to create a new literary world. Gomez fears that his wife's first manuscript is so good, that once the publisher reads it, he will lose her.

programme.title: Morticia, The Sculptress
programme.desc: In need of artistic fulfillment, Morticia takes up sculpting. An art critic views her first endeavor--a three-eyed Gomez statue--and clubs it with his cane. Gomez, who won't have Morticia's heart broken gets, a seedy art dealer to buy it.

programme.title: Gomez, The Reluctant Lover
programme.desc: Pugsley copies one of his dad's old love letters and sends it to his teacher. Miss Dunbar comes to visit the Addams home and confesses to Gomez that no man has ever fallen so in love with her, leading Morticia to pretend to be the jealous wife.

programme.desc: Two teams face off to guess Americans' responses to questions; John Michael Higgins hosts.

programme.title: Frisbee Friends vs. Trivia Kings
programme.desc: Teams answer everyday questions.

programme.title: Beauty & Brains vs. Swing Dancers
programme.desc: Teams say who pays for the honeymoon.

programme.title: Hostage Harts
programme.desc: Jonathan taken hostage.

programme.title: Pandora Has Wings
programme.desc: Jonathan serves as radio operator.

programme.title: Harts and Hounds
programme.desc: Philandering British husband.

programme.title: Wheels
programme.desc: J.J. and his friends buy a car together.

programme.title: Breaker, Breaker
programme.desc: Michael discovers world of CB radios.

programme.title: Bye, Bye, Bookman
programme.desc: Petition costs Bookman his job.

programme.title: Thelma's Brief Encounter
programme.desc: Mystery man romances Thelma.

programme.title: The Computer Age
programme.desc: Oliver champions agri-tech as way to increase productivity on the farm, but when a computer gives its assessment of the Douglas' marriage, Lisa (Eva Gabor) begins to question her union with Oliver. It's bits versus bytes in Green Acres!

programme.title: Lisa's Vegetable Garden
programme.desc: Determined to teach his spendthrift wife Lisa how to save money, Oliver insists that she learn about farming...by growing her own vegetables! In her own inimitable fashion, armed with useless pamphlets from Mr. Kimball, Lisa sets to tilling!

programme.title: The Saucer Season
programme.desc: When handyman Eb (Tom Lester) reports he has seen little green men piloting flying saucers, everyone in Hooterville takes him at his word�even the Air Force�and soon the Douglas farm becomes the Roswell of the greater Pixley area!

programme.title: Kimball Gets Fired
programme.desc: Ralph (Mary Grace Canfield) is distraught when her beloved Mr. Kimball, is fired as the county agricultural agent. Out of a job, Kimball (Alvy Moore) no longer has money enough to marry the lady-carpenter-in-waiting! But wait�did he even want to?

programme.title: The Vulgar Ring Story
programme.desc: Lisa weaves the tale of her great, great grandmother, the Queen of the Gypsies, to explain a bizarre family tradition: a woman in her family must marry an American -- but only every fourth generation -- in order to gain a special inheritance.

programme.title: Who's Lisa
programme.desc: After Oliver (Eddie Albert) accidentally drops a hammer on her head, Lisa (Eva Gabor) develops a case amnesia, with no idea who she is or why she is on a farm in Hooterville�and she adamantly refuses to believe that Oliver is her husband!

programme.title: Music To Milk By
programme.desc: Nothing gets done on the Douglas farm when Oliver (Eddie Albert) gifts Eb (Tom Lester) a top-of-the-line radio for his birthday. Letting nothing stop him, Eb (Tom Lester) enters a radio contest...even when Eleanor the cow swallows the radio whole.

programme.title: The Man For The Job
programme.desc: It's a very official third season premiere for Green Acres when the retirement of a state senator leaves Hooterville considering its best candidate for the job. Of course, they turn to their beloved lawyer-come-farmer Oliver Douglas (Eddie Albert).

programme.title: Lisa's Jam Session
programme.desc: Oliver finds himself in a jam after asking Lisa to make him homemade fruit preserves. An episode deliciously devoted to Lisa's culinary escapades, Lisa musters all of her Hungarian might to make Oliver the best peach jam he's ever tasted.

programme.title: Oliver Vs The Phone Company
programme.desc: After years of substandard service, Oliver is hellbent on throwing the book at the Hooterville Phone Company. When it becomes clear that the local utility oversight board can't do much about it, he decides to handle matters directly.

programme.title: Oliver Takes Over The Phone Company
programme.desc: Mr. Trendell, the president of the Hooterville Phone Company, hands the company over to a delighted Oliver. But after a day of crossed wires and a switchboard repairman with some lose connections of his own, Oliver is ready to call it quits.

programme.title: Don't Count Your Tomatoes Before They're Picked
programme.desc: For the first time, Oliver has a successful crop that needs picking. His tomatoes have grown beautifully. But matters at the phone company continue divide his precious time, so Oliver looks for an interested buyer to take the company off his hands.

programme.title: A Kind Word For The President
programme.desc: Being president of the Hooterville Phone Company has been a rude awakening for Oliver. The switchboard operator is now calling him at five in the morning! After a bevy of new complaints from unhappy customers, Oliver has just about had enough.

programme.title: Eb Elopes
programme.desc: One might think that when Eb takes a vacation things around the farm might go more smoothly. But when Eb elopes, leaving his cousin Walter to take his place, it turns out to be a horrible idea. Walter barely knows a weed from a hole in the ground!

programme.title: The Thing
programme.desc: Lisa is reminded that she stored a birthday present for Oliver years ago: a genuine Stavinsky. But what is it? It's a modern art sculpture that is two parts plumbing pipes, one part tire chains, and one part birdbath. Oliver calls it "The Thing."

programme.title: Das Lumpen
programme.desc: The continually evolving story of how Lisa (Eva Gabor) and Oliver (Oliver) fell in love gets yet another version in this delightful episode. But one thing is for sure: Lisa and Oliver are just as in love today as the day when he fell out of the sky.

programme.title: Jealousy, English Style
programme.desc: Green Acres is greener than ever, with jealousy. When Oliver (Eddie Albert) hires a handsome, young, intelligent Brit to take over his farm work while he is away, it doesn't take long for the newcomer to make a strong impression on Lisa (Eva Gabor).
